loginDescription: Welcome back! Please enter your account details
loginSubtitle: Secure and convenient user authentication experience
registerDescription: Fill in the information to create a new account
registerSubtitle: Get started in just a few seconds
networkError: Network error. Please check your connection
resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
resetPasswordInfo: Please enter the email address you used to register. We'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
resetLinkSentDescription: If that email address exists, you'll receive a password reset email within a few minutes.
invalidTokenDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
passwordResetSuccessDescription: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password.
tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later
